name: Naming Convention Check
author: DQT
description: Verify naming conventions for views, sheets, levels, grids, and families

rules.name: View Naming Convention
rules.description: Check view names follow naming pattern. Excludes view templates.

params.description: View names should start with uppercase letter

rules.name: Sheet Number Convention
rules.description: Check sheet numbers follow naming pattern

params.description: Sheet numbers: DISC-Number (e.g., A-101, S-201, M-301)

rules.name: Level Naming Convention
rules.description: Check level names follow standard pattern

params.description: Levels: B1, B2, L01, L02, Ground, Roof, etc.

rules.name: Grid Naming Convention
rules.description: Check grid names are single letters or numbers

params.description: Grids: A, B, AA, 1, 2, 10, A1, etc.

rules.name: Family Naming Convention
rules.description: Check loaded family names follow pattern (excludes In-Place)

params.description: Family names should start with uppercase
